title: You now have the complete picture
body: This section has walked through every major piece of the project: the JSON seed data system with $ref resolution, the Flask app factory with blueprints and services, the JsonDatabase with thread safety and atomic writes, the block-based content rendering pipeline, the Redux store with seven slices and selective persistence, the Material UI theming system, the next-intl internationalization setup, the Docker multi-stage builds, the docker-compose configurations, the GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline, and the step-by-step process for adding new content. You now have enough knowledge to rebuild this entire guide from scratch or extend it with new features.
